title: pelargonium × notatum
intro: Pelargonium × notatum, also known as Red Form Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × notatum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
